name: airlock
description: Prove what crossed the model boundary

assemble.description: Assemble a deterministic prompt payload plus prompt provenance.

verify.description: Verify a request boundary and emit an airlock manifest.

explain.description: Render a human-readable or machine-readable explanation of an airlock manifest.

doctor.description: Inspect read-only CLI health, capabilities, and machine triage contracts without reading run artifacts or touching witness state.
doctor.usage: airlock doctor health [--json] | airlock doctor capabilities --json | airlock doctor robot-docs | airlock doctor --robot-triage

capabilities.description: Read-only top-level alias for the machine-readable command, side-effect, and config contract.

robot-docs.description: Read-only top-level alias for the compact agent-facing guide.

witness.description: Query the local witness ledger without recording witness entries.
